hero.subtitle: Every solution is deployed within your environment, giving you complete ownership of your data, models, and operations.

solutions.title: Five ways we help you use AI
solutions.lead: Each service stands on its own or works together as a complete system. We focus on what your business needs — not on chasing the latest trend.

projects.title: Real systems we've built
projects.lead: Not demos. Not prototypes. These are working AI systems that solve real problems for real organizations.

why.title: What sets us apart
why.lead: Three commitments that shape everything we build — and every relationship we have with clients.

services.title: How we can help
services.lead: From a single AI assistant to a complete private AI platform, we meet you where you are.

aboutTeaser.title: We're engineers, not marketers.
aboutTeaser.body1: Haal Lab is an AI engineering company. We build intelligent software systems that help organizations work smarter — without sending their data to third-party services.
aboutTeaser.body2: We treat AI as a craft, not a buzzword. Our work spans from AI that runs entirely on your own computers, to smart search across your documents, to custom AI models built specifically for your tasks.

contactCta.title: Have a problem AI could solve?
contactCta.lead: Tell us what you're trying to achieve. We'll give you an honest, practical answer — usually within two business days. No sales pressure, no jargon.

partners.title: Working with the best
partners.lead: We've built relationships with the technology companies and research institutions that matter — so you benefit from the right tools for your specific needs.

advisors.title: Experts who guide our work
advisors.lead: Our advisors bring deep experience across AI research, engineering, privacy law, and security. They review our work and keep us honest.

footer.description: We build custom AI systems that run privately on your own computers — from smart document search to AI assistants that get work done.

solutions.title: AI solutions built for your business.
solutions.lead: Five ways we help organizations use AI — each can work on its own or together as a complete system. We focus on solving your actual problem, not on pushing a particular technology.

projects.title: Real AI systems we've built.
projects.lead: These aren't demos or prototypes. They're working systems that solve real problems. Each project shows the challenge, our approach, and the result.

research.title: What we're learning about AI.
research.lead: We share what we learn as we build — what works, what doesn't, and what's coming next. Written in plain language for business leaders and technical teams alike.

network.title: The people and organizations behind our work.
network.lead: Haal Lab is built on a network of technology partners and expert advisors. Together, they help us deliver AI systems that meet the real needs of European organizations.

about.title: An AI company built on engineering, not hype.
about.lead: Haal Lab builds intelligent software systems that help organizations work smarter — without sending their data to third-party services.

contact.title: Tell us what you're trying to achieve.
contact.lead: We respond to every serious inquiry with a practical, honest answer — usually within two business days. The more you tell us, the more useful our reply will be.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing for real AI systems.
pricing.lead: Four packages designed for startups, businesses, enterprises, and research institutions. Every tier delivers a working system — not a slide deck.
